response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, with strong leadership in mentoring and DevOps practices. However, his background is heavily focused on web/mobile development, AI infrastructure, and scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js, D), with limited direct experience in C++ systems programming, large-scale distributed systems, or cloud compute platform architecture. His leadership experience is more entrepreneurial and team-based rather than technical leadership in cloud infrastructure.
strengths: Strong mentorship and leadership experience through workshops, talks, and team contributions.
Hands-on experience with DevOps practices (CI/CD, Kubernetes, Docker) and infrastructure automation.
Proven ability to drive open-source projects and deliver scalable solutions across diverse domains.
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ (8 years minimum required) and large-scale cloud compute platforms.
No explicit experience with distributed systems, networking, or compute/storage hardware architecture.
Background skewed toward frontend/mobile and scripting languages, with minimal exposure to core cloud infrastructure technologies.
